user.title: Set up HeyCharge CONNECT
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your HeyCharge CONNECT device.

data_description.password: Leave the default unless you've changed the device's admin password (via UART or the device web UI). Older firmware ignores this field.

zeroconf_confirm.title: HeyCharge CONNECT discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

data_description.password: Leave the default unless you've changed the device's admin password (via UART or the device web UI). Older firmware ignores this field.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-enter HeyCharge CONNECT password
reauth_confirm.description: The device rejected the stored admin password. Enter the current password to reconnect.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Please check the host address and ensure the device is powered on and connected to your network.
error.invalid_auth: The device rejected the admin password. Double-check the value and try again.

abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the discovered device
abort.no_device_id: Discovered device did not advertise a device_id
